name: Ferplast Natural Collar C25/53
shortDescription: Premium leather dog collar with refined finishes and metal buckle. Adjustable, durable, and available in natural or black. Ideal for daily use.
description: The Ferplast Natural C Leather Dog Collar combines timeless style with durable craftsmanship, making it an ideal everyday collar for dogs of all sizes. Crafted from high-quality natural leather , this collar features simple yet refined lines with carefully finished details that deliver both elegance and strength. Designed for comfort and reliability, the collar is equipped with a sturdy metal buckle that ensures a secure and efficient closure. Multiple adjustment holes allow for an easy and precise fit, while strong stitching enhances durability for long-term use. With a circumference of 45–53 cm and a 25 mm width , the C25/53 size is well suited for medium to large dogs. Part of the Ferplast Natural range , this collar can be perfectly matched with Natural leather dog leads and training leads, creating a coordinated and sophisticated walking set. Available in natural beige leather or black , it’s a classic choice that never goes out of style. Key Characteristics Material: Premium natural leather Design: Simple, refined lines with elegant finishes Closure: Durable metal buckle Adjustability: Multiple holes for easy size adjustment Size (C25/53): Circumference: 45 – 53 cm Width: 25 mm Color: Natural leather (beige) SKU: 75215951 Range Compatibility: Matches Ferplast Natural dog leads and training leads Why Choose the Ferplast Natural Leather Collar? Elegant, timeless design suitable for everyday use Strong leather construction with reinforced stitching Comfortable and adjustable fit for growing or active dogs Secure fastening thanks to the refined metal buckle Complete matching range for a coordinated look
